name: localized_color_focus
description: Highlights compact, object-like candidate regions and produces zoomed color-focused panels to help inspect the color of a referenced local object without selecting an answer.
applicability_conditions: Use when the question asks for the color of a named object in a full image or prior artifact, especially when the object may be small, off-center, or one of several localized items (for example handbag, shirt, sign, swim ring, or car). This is appropriate after raw-image loading or after an earlier generic crop/overlay artifact when the next need is to inspect likely local object regions and their dominant visible colors more clearly.
